title: Downloading and importing data sets
text: help eatGets, national data sets large scale assessments, can applied Research Data Center Institute Educational Quality Improvement Germany (FDZ), can compared international data sets, can downloaded directly respective project websites. eatGets builds eatGADS.

title: Downloading and importing data sets
code: # Install stable version from CRAN via install.packages("eatGets")  # Install development version from GitHub via remotes::install_github("ruckeran/eatGets")

title: Downloading and importing data sets
text: functionality eatGets documented vignette future. questions regarding existing functionality requests new features, contact package author.

Download and import an empty FDZ file. — download_icils
text: year Year assessment. data_type Type data.

title: Download and import an empty FDZ file. — download_icils
text: function downloads imports empty ICILS data set (Leerdatensatz) FDZ homepage. data sets contain zero rows. data imported via import_spss GADSdat object.

title: Download and import an empty ICILS public use file. — download_icils_iea

title: Download and import an empty FDZ file. — download_iglu
code: fdz_iglu <- download_iglu(year = "2016",                         data_type = "stud_par_dat") #> Warning: Some values with value labels or missing tags of variable TR_ARBEITSV cannot be coerced to numeric and are therefore changed to NA. For other import behavior check out the 'labeledStrings' argument. #> Warning: Some values with value labels or missing tags of variable TR_SOZIALV cannot be coerced to numeric and are therefore changed to NA. For other import behavior check out the 'labeledStrings' argument. #> Warning: Some values with value labels or missing tags of variable ITDATE_FDZ cannot be coerced to numeric and are therefore changed to NA. For other import behavior check out the 'labeledStrings' argument. #> Warning: Duplicate value labels or missing tags are dropped for variable 'TR_ARBEITSV'. Only the respective first value label or missing tag is preserved and zero-decimals are dropped. #> Warning: no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf #> Warning: Duplicate value labels or missing tags are dropped for variable 'TR_SOZIALV'. Only the respective first value label or missing tag is preserved and zero-decimals are dropped. #> Warning: no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf #> Warning: Corrupted missing values haven been found in variable ITDATE_FDZ and are dropped. Contact package author for further information. The affected values are:NA

title: Download and import an empty PISA public use file. — download_pisa_oecd
text: PISA 2000–2012 function uses EdSurvey workflow (downloadPISA, readPISA) converts resulting file formats GADSdat object zero rows full metadata. PISA 2015 2018 function downloads zip file OECD homepage temporary directory, unzips imports data via read_sav read.table. downloading full PISA data sets see EdSurvey package.
